evals.prompt: I want to run a full quality test on the skill at ~/.claude/commands/patterns.md. Please use skill-test to plan and execute the complete testing pipeline, showing the operation plan for each stage.
evals.expected_output: Identifies target as skill/agent type, shows 5-stage pipeline (Triage → full static review → eval main loop → regression re-check → looper), each stage with clear operation description and exit condition.
assertions: Output contains 5 distinct stages (not 4 or 6), corresponding to the skill/agent path
First stage mentions Triage or --quick mode quick scan
Includes full static review stage, mentioning that researcher runs in round 1 only
Includes behavioral eval stage, mentioning ≤5 rounds or 5-round loop limit
Includes regression static re-check stage, mentioning --regression flag
Includes looper deployment verification stage, describing it as a terminal verifier

evals.prompt: Please use skill-test to generate a complete test plan for the pattern at ~/.claude/patterns/agent-monitoring.md. Include detailed descriptions for all stages.
evals.expected_output: Identifies target as pattern type, shows 7-stage pipeline (Triage → template review → settle-down → bridge verification → eval → regression → looper), includes generated-from check and dual-track static description.
assertions: Output contains 7 distinct stages (not 5), corresponding to the pattern path
Includes settle-down or instantiation step (/patterns agent-monitoring)

After settle-down stage (stage 3), includes a check that verifies the generated-from field exists in the output file, and states that if missing the fix must roll back to the pattern layer (not just fix the instance file)
Includes instance bridge verification step (skill-review --regression on the instance file)
Mentions that template-layer defects must roll back to the pattern layer for fixes (not just fix the instance file)

evals.prompt: /skill-test --from-stage 3 ~/.claude/commands/patterns.md — static review is complete (stages 1 and 2 passed), now continue from the eval stage. Please show the execution plan starting from stage 3.
evals.expected_output: Explicitly skips stages 1 and 2, starts from behavioral eval stage, shows eval loop logic (≤5 rounds), with_skill vs without_skill comparison, and pass rate convergence conditions.
assertions: Explicitly states that stage 1 (Triage) and stage 2 (full review) are skipped
Starts execution from stage 3 (behavioral eval)
Mentions with_skill and without_skill (or baseline) parallel runs for comparison
Mentions eval round limit (≤5 rounds)
Shows plan for subsequent stages (stage 4 regression re-check, stage 5 looper)

evals.prompt: The skill-test pipeline reached the final step (looper deployment verification), and the looper report shows the skill has a 0% trigger rate in a clean CC environment — no commands were recognized after installation. What should the next step be?
evals.expected_output: Clearly recommends not re-running looper, explains that looper is a terminal verifier not an iteration tool, indicates that looper failure means upstream filtering (eval or description optimization) missed a root cause, recommends rolling back to the eval stage with a specific --from-stage command.
assertions: Clearly recommends NOT re-running looper
Explains that looper is a terminal verifier, not an iteration tool
Recommends rolling back to the eval stage (not description optimization or other stages)
Provides a specific --from-stage command or equivalent recommendation
Analyzes possible root causes for 0% trigger rate (description field, description optimization not converged, etc.)
